name: logistics operations supervisors managing 5–15 fleet vehicles tool
description: For logistics operations supervisors managing 5–15 fleet vehicles, discrepancies in vehicle mileage tracking cause late deliveries. We provide automated mileage monitoring instead of manual mileage logs and spreadsheets.
target_audience: logistics operations supervisors managing 5–15 fleet vehicles
features: simple dashboard for tracking vehicle performance
